headline: Mortgage REIT ETF REM yields more than Treasuries, but watch the fine print
summary: The iShares Mortgage Real Estate ETF (NYSEARCA:REM) draws income investors with a yield that towers over Treasuries and conventional dividend stocks. The fund’s income comes from a concentrated portfolio of mortgage REITs, amplified by a covered call overlay that collects additional premium income from underlying positions.
